heading: Housing access
label: 1701z–12 Housing access
text: The Secretary shall require any purchaser of a multifamily housing project owned by the Secretary which is sold on or after , to agree not to refuse unreasonably to lease a vacant dwelling unit in the project which rents for an amount not greater than the fair market rent for a comparable unit in the area as determined by the Secretary under to a holder of a certificate of eligibility under that section solely because of such prospective tenant’s status as a certificate holder.October 1, 1978section 1437f of title 42
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Housing and Community Development Amendments of 1978, and not as part of the National Housing Act which comprises this chapter.
amendments: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Housing and Community Development Amendments of 1978, and not as part of the National Housing Act which comprises this chapter.
